items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding quiet hours.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior during quiet hours (no SMS from 10 PM to 8 AM). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to the SMS notifications during these hours. Without concrete evidence or endpoints demonstrating the expected behavior, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
